prompt: Task: Verify the login page: successful login with valid credentials shows a success message, and invalid credentials show an error.
output:
I'll start by reading the necessary configuration files to understand the project setup.  All source facts are verified. Now I'll produce the `specs/test-strategy.md`. `projects/demo/specs/test-strategy.md` is written. Here is the full Context Analyst report:

---

## Phase 0 — Bootstrap ✅

Project `demo` already exists at `projects/demo/`. No scaffolding needed.

---

## Phase 1 — Environment ✅

| Variable | Value |
|---|---|
| `TEST_URL` | `https://the-internet.herokuapp.com` |
| `TEST_USER` | `tomsmith` |
| `TEST_PASS` | `SuperSecretPassword!` |
| `TEST_AUTH_URL` | *(empty)* |
| `IDENTITY_PROVIDER` | *(N/A)* |

`docs/actualtestcases.csv` was found with **2 pre-defined test cases** — these have **highest priority** and are fully incorporated.

---

## Phase 2 — Authentication ✅

This is a **plain HTML form** application — not Azure AD / Cognito. The `auth.helper.ts` scaffold is present (framework requirement) but is not invoked. The verified login selectors from `project-memory.md` are:

| Element | Selector |
|---|---|
| Username | `#username` |
| Password | `#password` |
| Submit | `button[type="submit"]` |
| Success flash | `.flash.success` |
| Error flash | `.flash.error` |

---

## Phase 2b — Application Architecture ✅

**Routes table** (from `project-memory.md` + `docs/actualtestcases.csv`):

| Route | Purpose | Auth Required? |
|---|---|---|
| `/login` | Login form | No |
| `/secure` | Secure area (post-login) | Yes (session) |

---

## Phase 3 — Design Source of Truth ✅

No Figma URL provided in prompt or `.env`. Design-parity test cases are **deferred** pending a Figma source.

---

## Business Rules

| ID | Rule |
|---|---|
| **BR-001** | Valid credentials → redirect to `/secure` + `.flash.success` containing `"You logged into a secure area"` |
| **BR-002** | Invalid credentials → stay on `/login` + `.flash.error` containing `"Your username is invalid"` |

---

## Test Cases (Final List)

| # | Test Case | Type | Rule | Spec |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TC-DEMO-001 | Valid credentials reach the secure area | Functional | BR-001 | `tests/login.spec.ts:9` |
| TC-DEMO-002 | Invalid credentials show an error | Negative | BR-002 | `tests/login.spec.ts:18` |

Both tests are **already implemented** in `tests/login.spec.ts` and fully traced to `docs/actualtestcases.csv`.

---

## Handoff to Test Planner

The environment, selectors, business rules, and spec file are all verified. The **Test Planner** may now proceed with:
1. Running the existing `tests/login.spec.ts` against `https://the-internet.herokuapp.com`
2. UI exploration to validate live selectors and behavior
3. Logging any failures to `docs/issues.csv`
